name: codem
description: Codex usage monitor for GNOME Shell

scripts.check:size: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const limit=64*1024;const size=fs.statSync('build/extension.js').size;if(size>limit){console.error('build/extension.js is '+size+' bytes; limit is '+limit);process.exit(1)}console.log('build/extension.js is '+size+' bytes')"
